en: O LORD, you are my God; I will exalt you; I will praise your name, for you have done wonderful things, plans formed of old, faithful and sure.
zh: 耶和華啊！你是我的 神， 我要尊崇你，稱謝你的名， 因為你以信實真誠作成了奇妙的事， 就是你遠古以前所計劃的事。

en: For you have made the city a heap, the fortified city a ruin; the foreigners' palace is a city no more; it will never be rebuilt.
zh: 你使城市變成廢堆， 使堅固城變為荒涼的地方， 使外族人的城堡不再為城， 永遠不得重建。

en: Therefore strong peoples will glorify you; cities of ruthless nations will fear you.
zh: 因此，強大的民族必榮耀你； 強暴之國的城也要敬畏你。

en: For you have been a stronghold to the poor, a stronghold to the needy in his distress, a shelter from the storm and a shade from the heat; for the breath of the ruthless is like a storm against a wall,
zh: 你作了困乏人的保障、 貧窮人急難中的保障、 躲暴風雨的避難所、避炎熱的陰涼處； 因為強暴者所吹的氣， 如同直吹牆壁的暴風。

en: like heat in a dry place. You subdue the noise of the foreigners; as heat by the shade of a cloud, so the song of the ruthless is put down.
zh: 你抑制外族人的喧嘩，好像減低乾旱之地的炎熱； 你禁止強暴者的凱歌，好像熱氣因雲彩而消散。

en: On this mountain the LORD of hosts will make for all peoples a feast of rich food, a feast of well-aged wine, of rich food full of marrow, of aged wine well refined.
zh: 萬軍之耶和華必在這山上為萬民擺設豐盛美筵，有陳酒、滿髓的肥甘和醇美好酒。

en: And he will swallow up on this mountain the covering that is cast over all peoples, the veil that is spread over all nations.
zh: 他又必在這山上除滅那遮蓋萬民的面巾，和那遮蓋列國的帕子。

en: He will swallow up death forever; and the Lord GOD will wipe away tears from all faces, and the reproach of his people he will take away from all the earth, for the LORD has spoken.
zh: 他要吞滅死亡，直到永遠；主耶和華必擦去各人臉上的眼淚，又從地上除掉他子民的羞辱；這是耶和華說的。

en: It will be said on that day, "Behold, this is our God; we have waited for him, that he might save us. This is the LORD; we have waited for him; let us be glad and rejoice in his salvation."
zh: 到那日，必有人說：“看哪！這是我們的 神；我們信靠他，他必拯救我們。這是耶和華，我們所倚靠的，我們要因他的拯救歡喜快樂。

en: For the hand of the LORD will rest on this mountain, and Moab shall be trampled down in his place, as straw is trampled down in a dunghill.
zh: 耶和華的手必放在這山上；但摩押人在自己的地方必受踐踏，好像乾草在糞坑中被踐踏一樣。

en: And he will spread out his hands in the midst of it as a swimmer spreads his hands out to swim, but the LORD will lay low his pompous pride together with the skill of his hands.
zh: 他們必在其中伸開手來，好像游泳者伸開手來游泳一樣；但耶和華要使他們的驕傲和他們手所行的詭計，一同敗落。

en: And the high fortifications of his walls he will bring down, lay low, and cast to the ground, to the dust.
zh: 耶和華必使他們高聳而堅固的城牆傾倒下陷，落在地面，變作塵土。”
